{{Infobox concept
| name = jade
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The character intends to exchange his iron for [[jade]].}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“You’re Jade too, for now,” she pointed out.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
